1010501.name: In Times Like These...
1010501.desc: Upon triggering Tremor Burst on an enemy, inflict 1 Defense Level Down per 4 Stagger Threshold raised (Max 5 per 1 enemy every turn)

1010521.name: Cleaning Up the Mess
1010521.desc: When 1 ally with the lowest Max HP triggers Tremor Burst on an enemy, inflict 1 Defense Level Down per 4 Stagger Threshold raised (Max 3 per 1 enemy every turn)
